testcase.name: wtfRate returns the ratio of bad lines to total lines()

failure.message: kotlin.NotImplementedError: An operation is not implemented: Return the ratio badLines / totalLines — the lower, the cleaner the code

testcase.name: isBoyScoutCompliant returns true when after is shorter than before()

failure.message: kotlin.NotImplementedError: An operation is not implemented: Apply 'Boy Scout Rule' — is 'after' cleaner (shorter) than 'before'?

testcase.name: responsibilities splits a camelCase function name on And()
